extra.reason: Foundation gates landed in PR #11 (CI all green at 6522523). parser.go:112 defer --until preservation fix + StatusDeferred + DeferredUntil field + 2 regression tests (TestDeferredUntilPreserved + TestDeferredUntilOnlyAttachedWhenDeferred). gt 0.9 wisps adapter migration replacing legacy molecule.json file reads (parseWispListOutput + rawWisp.toMolecule + Molecules() shelling gt wisps list --json with graceful degradation). Gemini round-1 (2 medium findings) addressed in c5039d2: ctx.Err propagation distinguishing timeout from gt-missing, case-insensitive step status compare. Lint failure (S1009 redundant nil check) fixed in 6522523. PR not yet merged; bead closure does not block on merge per project workflow.

Surface 2 (dolt sync widget) + Surface 3 (human triage READ-VIEW) + closeout landed in PR #13. Surface 1 (memories panel) filed as gastown-fp0 — originally underfiled in my sub-beads. v0.5.0 tag waits for gastown-fp0 + all PRs merged to master.

Phase 2 Surface 1 (read-only memories panel) landed in PR #14. internal/model/memory.go (Memory + MemoriesResponse). internal/beads/{parser.go,adapter.go}: ParseMemories handling bd 1.0.4 flat-object shape with schema_version sentinel; sorted-by-key; Memories/Memory/SearchMemories adapter methods. internal/api/memoryredact.go: full 005-PP-POLICY implementation — Class A partner-name substring matching (kobiton/nixtla/mudit/polygon) + whole-word matching (lit/elm) with false-positive defense; Class B secret-prefix runs (10 prefixes) with 16-char min length; longer-prefix-wins ordering; reveal passthrough; nil-memory guard. internal/api/handlers.go: GET /api/v1/memories + /memories/{key} + /memories/search — all read-only, all apply default redaction unless ?reveal=true. internal/api/server.go: zero POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE under /api/v1/memories/* per Q2 invariant (tripwire test asserts this). web/src/{api.ts,App.tsx}: Memory tab with persistent screen-share banner + per-card Reveal toggle that doesn't persist across navigations + Copy 'bd recall <key>' CLI-passthrough + autocomplete=off. 19 new tests covering parser/adapter/redaction/handler-wiring. go test + vet + goimports + web lint + web build all green. With this bead closed, all Phase 2 council deliverables are on branches; merging 5 PRs makes v0.5.0 taggable.
